creator: udo@iml.fhg.de
text:
1) The nwclient port installs all its manpages into /usr/local/man/man8,
   even those who should go into /usr/local/man/man[135]
2) The files in $WORKDIR/catman are formatted manpages and should be
   installed into the catX directories, not manX.

How-To-Repeat: 
make install in the ports dir
check /usr/local/man/man8
